title: Kingdom relationship coaching outcome
description: Three months from now, clients will see themselves as complete men with life in balance—relationships, money, hobbies—rooted in deeper relationship with Christ, so they won't fear losing the right partner because their purpose is greater than any relationship.
full_idea: Remember that the key outcome that I am going to be selling in my kingdom relationship coaching program is in three months they’re gonna be able to look at themselves in the mirror and know that they are the type of man that has a a complete life, relationships, money, hobbies, etc. that is built on the sturdy foundation of deepening relationship with Christ, so that when the right woman is in their life, they will never have to worry about losing the woman they love again (that worrying/anxiety/fear is the symptom of idolatry which is the problem I solve) because they actually have a purpose that is greater than any single human relationship
source_text: Remember that the key outcome that I am going to be selling in my kingdom relationship coaching program is in three months they’re gonna be able to look at themselves in the mirror and know that they are the type of man that has a a complete life, relationships, money, hobbies, etc. that is built on the sturdy foundation of deepening relationship with Christ, so that when the right woman is in their life, they will never have to worry about losing the woman they love again (that worrying/anxiety/fear is the symptom of idolatry which is the problem I solve) because they actually have a purpose that is greater than any single human relationship
